steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the Galápagos penguin and the grey warbler finch. The notes show that both birds can be found on the Galápagos Island of Floreana, while their weights are different.

steps.title: Reject non-similarities
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes contrasting weights. Choice B mentions only the finch. Choice D mentions only the penguin. The needed sentence states the place both birds share. The answer is C.
